category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Stella as a multi-platform Atari 2600 emulator.
source_facts.description says this is an Atari 2600 VCS emulator.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use the project name Stella.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says the user's manual is in the docs subdirectory.
Official Stella site hosts the User's Guide under /docs/index.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/stella-emu/stella, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include emulator, emulation, atari2600, atari, and atari-2600.
